channel.title: Trump's Truth Social Posts
channel.description: Archived posts from @realDonaldTrump on Truth Social

item.title: Truth Social post
item.description: GREAT NEWS for America! We are bringing manufacturing back like never before. The deals being made are INCREDIBLE!

item.title: Truth Social post
item.description: Spoke with many world leaders today. Everyone wants to make a deal with the USA. America First is working!

item.title: Truth Social post
item.description: The Fake News Media refuses to cover the booming economy. Stock markets are UP, unemployment is DOWN, and inflation is being CRUSHED!

item.title: Truth Social post — old
item.description: This is an old post that should be filtered out by the window.
